notes: One-hand plus off-hand beats available staves. Gem haste (Reckless/Energized) until your haste goal, Intellect-focused (Potent/Purified) after. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
